tasks.completion_summary: Added TranspileContext enum (Default, Eval) with Transpile overloads on BashTranspiler and PsEmitter; threaded context via ThreadStatic with try/finally; added internal PsBuiltinAliases HashSet and documented the Eval branch in EmitSimple standalone-mapping path. 6 new tests verify ls -la, sleep 1, diff a b, pwd emit Invoke-Bash* under Eval, and Default context matches the no-context overload. All 590 Core tests pass.
Added 5 history persistence integration tests and fixed InteractiveShell to use PSBASH_HOME for DB path isolation

Multi-line continuation (PS2): fixed IsIncomplete to detect trailing | and && operators; fixed parser to skip newlines after | and && (line continuation); added WaitForAnyPromptAsync to harness; added 6 MultiLine tests all passing.

Audited source/. coverage: all 7 cases verified; added 3 missing tests (relative path, multi-arg positional, nested source); created docs/testing/interactive-parity-audit.md with Directive 10 audit section; all 9 InvokeBashSourceCommandTests pass.
Created PsBash.Escalation.Tests with 8 fault-injection tests (Directive 7) and 3 known-bad regression tests (Directive 13). All 11 tests pass.

Added SecurityProbeTests.cs (6 security tests, Directive 12) and ScaleTests.cs (4 scale tests, Directive 7). Security tests use canary-file + PayloadIsOnlyInsideStringLiterals check. Scale tests redesigned to avoid yes|head (buffering issue) and heredoc+pipe (transpiler limitation), using seq-based pipelines instead. All 21 escalation tests pass.

Phase 8: Coverlet wired into all test projects and scripts/test.sh; publish.yml uploads coverage XML artifact; scripts/coverage-report.sh and scripts/diff-coverage.sh created; docs/testing/qa-dashboard.md created with coverage, mutation, flake budget, quarantine register, and quarantine convention sections.
